generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor deployed within building infrastructure to monitor occupancy patterns and environmental conditions for real-time feedback loops between physical and virtual systems"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructure
]

instance EnvironmentalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing real-time operational data including temperature, humidity, light levels, and CO₂ levels within building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructure
]

instance HVACUnitActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded HVAC unit actuator enabling real-time control of heating, ventilation, and air conditioning systems based on DT-driven control policies"
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructure
]

instance LightingFixtureActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart lighting fixture actuator supporting user-centered control strategies like adaptive lighting schedules through bidirectional communication with DT"
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructure
]

instance ShadingDeviceActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building shading device actuator integrated with DT for automated control based on environmental sensor data and occupant comfort requirements"
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructure
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision temperature sensor deployed within building infrastructure to monitor environmental conditions for energy optimization and comfort analytics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructure
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor capturing real-time moisture levels within building spaces to support HVAC system optimization and occupant comfort"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructure
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Ambient light sensor measuring illumination levels for adaptive lighting control and energy consumption optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructure
]

instance CO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "CO₂ concentration sensor monitoring indoor air quality to support ventilation system control and occupant health optimization"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2DataTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn BuildingInfrastructure
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalSensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance CO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2Sensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Comprehensive Building Information Modeling (BIM) model serving as the semantic backbone providing geometry, topology, and component relationships for the DT"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto, UnrealEngine5
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinRuntime
]

instance RuntimeSemanticModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-driven transformation output containing structured representations of physical assets and control logic extracted from BIM for DT runtime operations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinRuntime
]

instance IFCData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Industry Foundation Classes (IFC) formatted data representing building components and their relationships, used for DT visualization and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted, TemperatureDataTransmitted, LightLevelDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinRuntime
]

instance COBieData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Construction Operations Building Information Exchange (COBie) formatted data containing device configurations and operational information for DT deployment"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2DataTransmitted, HumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinRuntime
]

instance SensorConfigurationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured data containing sensor configurations and device endpoints extracted from BIM for automated DT deployment"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinRuntime
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source IoT connectivity platform enabling real-time data ingestion and device management for sensor data acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviceManagementService, DataIngestionService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinRuntime
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Service-oriented Digital Twin framework enabling bidirectional communication between DT and physical systems through standardized interfaces"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlService, AnalyticsService, LifecycleManagementService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinRuntime
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "High-fidelity 3D visualization tool providing interactive monitoring, simulation, and user interaction dashboards for building operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinRuntime
]

instance BIMTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Generic Building Information Modeling software (e.g., Revit, ArchiCAD) used for initial modeling and device configuration extraction"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelEnrichmentService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinRuntime
]

// C6: Services
instance DeviceManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling device registration, authentication, and configuration management for IoT devices within the DT ecosystem"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceConfigurationInsight
]

instance DataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service responsible for routing and preprocessing sensor data from Hono to Ditto for further processing"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransformationInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing user-defined or AI-driven control strategies for building systems like lighting and HVAC through bidirectional communication"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveControlAction
]

instance AnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service performing predictive analytics on building performance data to identify energy savings and maintenance opportunities"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, OccupantComfortInsight, PredictiveMaintenanceAlert
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing immersive 3D visualization of operational parameters through Unreal Engine for stakeholder monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalDashboardInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service simulating building performance to optimize energy consumption and occupant comfort based on runtime data"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceSimulationInsight
]

instance LifecycleManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service supporting design-to-operation workflows including clash detection, commissioning, and maintenance planning"
    DTDFVocab:provides LifecycleCostAssessmentInsight
]

instance ModelEnrichmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service extending BIM models with runtime metadata including IoT device endpoints and control logic"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelEnrichmentInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance DeviceConfigurationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight containing standardized device configurations extracted from BIM for automated DT deployment"
]

instance DataTransformationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight representing model-driven transformations converting sensor data into BIM-compatible formats (IFC, COBie)"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive model identifying energy savings opportunities through adaptive lighting schedules and HVAC setpoint optimization"
]

instance OccupantComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of sensor trends recommending adaptive control policies for improved occupant well-being and satisfaction"
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Machine learning model detecting equipment degradation and suggesting proactive maintenance actions"
]

instance LifecycleCostAssessmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation of long-term operational costs including energy consumption and maintenance expenses for design decisions"
]

instance AdaptiveControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated execution of user-defined or AI-driven control strategies for building systems"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PerformanceSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results showing building performance metrics for energy savings and comfort optimization"
]

instance OperationalDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization dashboard providing real-time monitoring of operational parameters through Unreal Engine"
]

instance ModelEnrichmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Metadata added to BIM models including IoT device endpoints and control logic configurations"
]

// C1: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructure : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical building environment containing all operational control systems including HVAC, lighting, and sensor networks"
    base:contains OccupancySensor, EnvironmentalSensor, TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, LightLevelSensor, CO2Sensor, HVACUnitActuator, LightingFixtureActuator, ShadingDeviceActuator
]

instance DigitalTwinRuntime : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Virtual environment hosting all DT services, models, and data processing components"
    base:contains BIMModel, RuntimeSemanticModel, IFCData, COBieData, SensorConfigurationData, EclipseHono, EclipseDitto, UnrealEngine5, BIMTool
]

// C1: SystemUnderStudy
instance BuildingSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure system under study for digital twin implementation"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment BuildingInfrastructure, DigitalTwinRuntime
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction involves the **generation and transmission of control signals** from the DT back to the physical Building Control System (BCS). The framework supports **closed-loop control** by enabling the DT to process real-time data and generate **outputs** (e.g., control commands) that adjust physical systems (e.g., lighting, HVAC). While specific protocols like MQTT or HTTP are not mentioned, the text emphasizes **bidirectional communication** between the DT and BCS, ensuring that the DT can **execute control logic** and **adjust operational parameters** dynamically. This interaction is critical for achieving real-time synchronization and optimization."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is characterized by **real-time data exchange** with low-latency requirements to support dynamic interactions between the DT and physical systems. While specific time scales (e.g., milliseconds to days) are not explicitly quantified, the framework emphasizes **real-time synchronization** for operational decision-making. The DT must process and respond to sensor data and control signals **in near real-time** to enable effective monitoring, simulation, and optimization of building operations. The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the fidelity of this real-time synchronization over time."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented, middleware-integrated ecosystem** with the following components:
  - **BIM Core**: The **semantic backbone** providing spatial, geometric, and functional data of the building infrastructure.
  - **IoT Layer**: **Eclipse Hono** acts as the **IoT gateway**, aggregating sensor data and routing commands to physical devices.
  - **DT Platform**: **Eclipse Ditto** hosts the **runtime DT instance**, managing **service composition**, **data synchronization**, and **control logic execution**.
  - **Visualization Layer**: **Unreal Engine 5** provides an **interactive 3D interface** for monitoring and controlling the DT.
  - **Extension Services**: **Modular plugins** (e.g., energy optimization, predictive maintenance) are integrated via Ditto’s **service mesh**, enabling **scalable, domain-specific functionality**.
  The constellation follows a **publish-subscribe model** for data exchange, ensuring **loose coupling** between components and **high interoperability** across heterogeneous systems."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **all phases of the building life cycle**, from **design to operation and maintenance**, with distinct representation phases:
  - **Design phase**: BIM models are enriched with **semantic metadata** (e.g., device configurations, control logic) to prepare for DT deployment.
  - **Construction phase**: **As-built BIM models** are validated against physical assets, and IoT devices are commissioned via the DT framework.
  - **Operation phase**: The DT **continuously synchronizes** with physical systems, enabling real-time monitoring, control, and optimization (e.g., energy savings, occupant comfort).
  - **Maintenance phase**: The DT supports **predictive maintenance** by analyzing sensor data (e.g., equipment wear) and generating alerts for proactive interventions.
  The framework ensures **backward compatibility** with legacy BIM models and **forward extensibility** for emerging technologies (e.g., AI, 5G)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through the **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**, which evaluates the alignment between the DT and its physical counterpart. The framework addresses **semantic drift** by continuously synchronizing runtime data with BIM models and ensuring that the DT reflects the current state of the physical system. While specific verification methods (e.g., Alloy) are not mentioned, the text emphasizes the importance of **synchronization techniques** to maintain model integrity and support decision-making."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection relies on **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** for **real-time data exchange**, enabling bidirectional communication between the physical system and the DT. While specific protocols (e.g., MQTT, HTTP) are not detailed, the framework supports **standardized middleware integration** to facilitate seamless data transmission. The connection ensures low-latency interaction for real-time monitoring and control, though exact latency specifications are not provided."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed in a **scalable architecture** that supports modular integration and extensibility. The framework does not specify exact hosting infrastructure (e.g., AWS, Azure), but it emphasizes **scalable deployment** to accommodate growing complexity and evolving requirements. The focus is on **automated deployment** and **modular service integration**, ensuring that the DT can be scaled and adapted without significant overhead."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT supports **horizontal integration** through **standardized extension points**, allowing for the integration of custom services and external systems. While specific external systems (e.g., AWS IoT) are not mentioned, the framework enables seamless communication with **heterogeneous platforms** via middleware (e.g., Eclipse Hono, Ditto). This integration facilitates the exchange of data with other digital ecosystems, ensuring interoperability and scalability."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT system adheres to **AECO-specific standards**, primarily **Building Information Modeling (BIM)**, which provides the **semantic backbone** for **device modeling, control logic, and runtime configurations**. The framework leverages **open-source middleware** (Eclipse Hono, Ditto) for **standardized IoT connectivity** and **service-oriented architectures**. While **IFC (Industry Foundation Classes)** and **COBie (Construction Operations Building Information Exchange)** are **commonly associated with BIM**, they are not explicitly mentioned in the provided documents as part of the DT standardization process."
]
